task: PRD 05 — RenderSdk facade + waitForCompletion poll loop (.omc/plans/05-render-sdk-wait.md)

stories.title: waitForCompletion poll loop (src/wait.ts)
acceptanceCriteria: src/wait.ts exports `waitForCompletion(adapter: Pick<RenderAdapter<unknown>,'getState'>, handle, opts?): Promise<RenderState>`
Polls getState every intervalMs (default 1000), calls opts.onProgress(progress) each tick
Resolves the final state when status==='done'
Throws RenderError('render_failed', state.error) when status==='error'
Rejects RenderError('timeout', ...) when timeoutMs exceeded
Rejects RenderError('adapter_error','aborted') when opts.signal is aborted; abort interrupts mid-wait (abortable delay, not just between polls)
No @remotion/* import anywhere in the file

stories.title: RenderSdk<A> facade (src/sdk.ts)
acceptanceCriteria: src/sdk.ts exports class RenderSdk<A extends RenderAdapter<any>> with constructor({ adapter, store? })
start(input, options?: OptionsOf<A>), getState, getUrl, download all delegate to the adapter
waitForCompletion(handle, opts?) method delegates to the standalone wait loop using this.adapter
start's options arg is inferred as the adapter's options type (OptionsOf<A>) with no `as` cast
store is accepted and held (exposed/retained) but not read/written by the SDK itself
No @remotion/* import anywhere in the file

stories.title: Re-export RenderSdk + waitForCompletion from index.ts
acceptanceCriteria: src/index.ts re-exports RenderSdk and waitForCompletion
Built dist root .d.ts stays remotion-free (grep -rl '@remotion' dist returns nothing)

stories.title: Tests: delegation, wait semantics, type narrowing
acceptanceCriteria: test/sdk.test.ts: fake adapter verifies all five methods delegate; store held/passed through
test/wait.test.ts: scripted adapter queued->rendering(0.5)->done asserts onProgress callbacks + resolution; separate cases for error (throws render_failed), timeout, abort
A type-level test (@ts-expect-error or expectTypeOf) encodes options narrowing: correct adapter option compiles, wrong-shape option is a compile error
bun run types: 0 errors
bun run build: exit 0
bun test: all pass, 0 fail
